project_area: Programs supporting men and boys across Boston's neighborhoods
demographic_requirements: Focus on community-based organizations serving men and boys, with emphasis on Black male community in prior years
eligibility_summary: Local community-based nonprofit organizations in Boston are eligible to apply for grants to expand their impact and strengthen programs supporting men and boys. The fund provides up to $20,000 per organization, with a total of $500,000 available for the 2026 cycle.
